message:
fix: delta fence leak, field aliasing, KILL reason normalization

- Skip non-delta messages before parsing to prevent kickoff/nudge
  example fences from being compiled as real operations
- Add FIELD_ALIASES map (title→name, protocol→procedure, kill_reason→reason,
  methodology→procedure, rationale→reason) with normalizePayloadFields()
  applied in applyAdd and both applyEdit code paths
- Normalize kill_reason→reason before KILL validation in delta parser
- Change example fences in role_prompts_v0.1.md from ```delta to ```json
  to prevent accidental parser triggering

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
